recommendations.title: The Paper Chase
recommendations.overview: A first-year law student struggles with balancing his coursework and his relationship with the daughter of a stern professor.

recommendations.title: Perfect
recommendations.overview: A female aerobics instructor meets a male reporter doing a story on health clubs, but it isn't love at first sight.

recommendations.title: Bright Lights, Big City
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned young writer living in New York City turns to drugs and drinking to block out the memories of his dead mother and estranged wife.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.
